summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Assistant Melus app. All backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Admin login, admin panel, app generator, and chat with IA all functional.

issues: Some interactive elements missing data-testid attributes - recommend adding for better test coverage

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: 1) Admin login with provided credentials works, 2) Admin panel at /admin shows dashboard with user stats, revenue, agent usage, 3) App generator at /generator shows agent console with all 6 agents (orchestrator, design, frontend, backend, database, deploy), 4) Chat with AI from dashboard working with GPT-4o, 5) Credits system working (admin has 9404 credits), 6) Header shows Admin button, Generar App button, and credits. All backend APIs tested via pytest including: health check, agent costs, admin dashboard, admin users, system health, transactions, projects, revenue chart, credit settings, credit balance, packages, subscriptions, usage, promo codes.

features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Login with rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com / 19862210Des works, user is_admin=true
features_tested.admin_panel: PASS - Dashboard shows 40 users, 74 active, $0 revenue, agent usage
features_tested.admin_users: PASS - Users list endpoint returns users without password_hash
features_tested.admin_system_health: PASS - MongoDB and API both healthy
features_tested.app_generator: PASS - Shows all 6 agents, input fields, generate button
features_tested.agent_analyze: PASS - Orchestrator analyzes projects using 50 credits
features_tested.credits_system: PASS - Balance, packages, subscriptions, usage all working
features_tested.header_buttons: PASS - Admin, Generar App, credits display all visible
features_tested.agent_costs_api: PASS - Returns orchestrator=50, design=100, frontend=150, backend=150, database=100, deploy=200

mocked_apis.voice_transcription: Voice transcription (Whisper integration) is MOCKED/pending as noted in review request
